title: Short-Term vs Long-Term
concept: Separating active task state (context window) from persistent history and knowledge stores (database/vectors).

exercises.prompt: What is the role of memory in AI agents?

options.text: To store data only for a moment
To help the agent remember tasks and previous interactions

exercises.explain: AI agents use memory to remember tasks and interactions, helping them respond better and learn.

cards.title: Short-Term vs Long-Term Memory
cards.body: Just like humans, AI can remember things in two ways: short-term and long-term.

cards.title: What is Short-Term Memory?
cards.body: Short-term memory holds information for a brief time, like remembering a phone number until you dial it.

cards.title: Analogy for Short-Term Memory
cards.body: Think of short-term memory as a sticky note on your desk—it holds important info for now, but you can easily remove it when it’s no longer needed.

cards.title: Example of Short-Term Memory in AI
cards.body: An AI may remember your last question while you are still chatting with it, but it won’t remember it next time you talk.

cards.title: Common Myth About Memory
cards.body: Some think all AI memories last forever, but short-term memory is temporary and used for active tasks.

cards.title: Memory Types Comparison
cards.body: Comparison of short-term vs long-term memory in AI.

exercises.prompt: What does short-term memory allow an AI agent to do?
exercises.explain: Short-term memory allows AI to keep track of relevant information during an ongoing interaction.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Long-term memory in AI is used only for current tasks.
exercises.explain: This is false because long-term memory stores historical knowledge and does not serve just for current tasks.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: Short-term memory holds information for a _____ time.
exercises.sentence: Short-term memory holds information for a brief time.
exercises.explain: The correct word is 'brief', indicating that short-term memory does not retain information for long.

exercises.prompt: Which option describes short-term memory in AI?

options.text: It helps remember current tasks and context.
It processes information at lightning speed.

exercises.explain: The correct description of short-term memory is its role in managing and recalling current tasks and context.

exercises.prompt: What is the main difference between short-term and long-term memory in AI agents?

options.text: Short-term memory is for immediate tasks, long-term is for history and knowledge.
Both types of memory are temporary and do the same job.
Short-term memory saves everything, while long-term memory is erased frequently.
Long-term memory works faster than short-term memory.

exercises.explain: The main difference is that short-term memory is used for immediate tasks while long-term memory stores historical information and knowledge.
